sentences.target: Die alte Photographie hängt im Flur.

translations.de: Die alte Photographie hängt im Flur.
translations.en: The old photograph hangs in the hallway.
translations.es: La foto antigua cuelga en el pasillo.
translations.fr: La vieille photo est accrochée dans le couloir.
translations.it: La vecchia foto è appesa nel corridoio.
translations.pt: A foto antiga está pendurada no corredor.
translations.vi: Bức ảnh cũ treo ở hành lang.
translations.nl: De oude foto hangt in de gang.
translations.hu: A régi fénykép a folyosón lóg.
translations.hi: पुरानी तस्वीर गलियारे में टंगी है.
translations.el: Η παλιά φωτογραφία κρέμεται στον διάδρομο.
translations.nb: Det gamle bildet henger i gangen.
translations.id: Foto lama itu tergantung di lorong.
translations.sv: Det gamla fotot hänger i hallen.
translations.ro: Fotografia veche este agățată în hol.
translations.da: Det gamle foto hænger i gangen.
translations.ja: 古い写真が廊下に掛かっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determines the noun 'Photographie' as the subject.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection after a definite article; agrees with feminine singular nominative noun 'Photographie'.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; head of the NP functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive, describes location/state of the subject.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); selects dative for static location.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Ich studiere Photographie an der Kunsthochschule.

translations.de: Ich studiere Photographie an der Kunsthochschule.
translations.en: I study photography at the art college.
translations.es: Estudio fotografía en la escuela de arte.
translations.fr: J'étudie la photographie à l'école d'art.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在艺术学院学习摄影。
translations.ru: Я изучаю фотографию в художественном колледже.
translations.pt: Eu estudo fotografia na faculdade de artes.
translations.vi: Tôi học nhiếp ảnh ở trường nghệ thuật.
translations.nl: Ik studeer fotografie aan de kunstacademie.
translations.uk: Я вивчаю фотографію в художньому коледжі.
translations.hi: मैं कला महाविद्यालय में फ़ोटोग्राफ़ी पढ़ता हूँ.
translations.el: Σπουδάζω φωτογραφία στη σχολή καλών τεχνών.
translations.id: Saya belajar fotografi di sekolah seni.
translations.ro: Studiez fotografie la facultatea de arte.
translations.ja: 美術大学で写真を学んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; takes a direct object indicating field of study.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object denoting the discipline studied.
Preposition selecting dative for location ('an der Kunsthochschule').
Definite article, feminine singular dative; determines 'Kunsthochschule' as the object of the preposition.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of 'an' indicating place of study.

sentences.target: Er schenkt mir eine Photographie vom Ausflug.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʃɛŋkt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə fotoɡʁaˈfiː fɔm ˈaʊ̯sˌfluːk/

translations.de: Er schenkt mir eine Photographie vom Ausflug.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʃɛŋkt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə fotoɡʁaˈfiː fɔm ˈaʊ̯sˌfluːk/
translations.en: He gives me a photograph from the trip.
translations.es: Me regala una foto del viaje.
translations.fr: Il m'offre une photo du voyage.
translations.it: Mi regala una foto del viaggio.
translations.ko: 그가 여행에서 찍은 사진을 나에게 선물해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他送给我一张旅行照片。
translations.ru: Он дарит мне фотографию с поездки.
translations.pt: Ele me dá uma foto da viagem.
translations.vi: Anh ấy tặng tôi một tấm ảnh từ chuyến đi.
translations.nl: Hij geeft me een foto van de reis.
translations.uk: Він дарує мені фотографію з поїздки.
translations.hu: Ad nekem egy fényképet az útról.
translations.hi: वह मुझे यात्रा की एक तस्वीर देता है.
translations.pl: On daje mi zdjęcie z wycieczki.
translations.el: Μου δίνει μια φωτογραφία από την εκδρομή.
translations.nb: Han gir meg et bilde fra turen.
translations.id: Dia memberi saya sebuah foto dari perjalanan.
translations.sv: Han ger mig ett foto från resan.
translations.ro: Îmi dă o fotografie din excursie.
translations.da: Han giver mig et foto fra turen.
translations.ja: 彼は旅行の写真を一枚くれます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; ditransitive, taking a dative recipient and an accusative theme.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object (recipient) of 'schenkt'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determines the direct object 'Photographie'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object (theme) of 'schenkt'.
Preposition (contraction of 'von dem'); selects dative, introducing a source/origin PP.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'vom'.

sentences.target: Wir sprechen über Photographie im Café.

translations.de: Wir sprechen über Photographie im Café.
translations.en: We talk about photography in the café.
translations.es: Hablamos de fotografía en la cafetería.
translations.fr: Nous parlons de photographie au café.
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店傾下攝影。
translations.pt: Nós conversamos sobre fotografia no café.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים על צילום בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nói chuyện về nhiếp ảnh ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: We praten over fotografie in het café.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про фотографію в кафе.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में फ़ोटोग्राफ़ी के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για τη φωτογραφία στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om fotografi på kafé.
translations.id: Kami ngobrol tentang fotografi di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om fotografi på kafé.
translations.da: Vi taler om fotografi på caféen.
translations.ja: 私たちはカフェで写真について話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present indicative; takes a prepositional object with 'über' + accusative.
Preposition; with the sense 'about', selects accusative for its object.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'über'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); selects dative for static location.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'im' indicating location.
